summary: Expense Plan (План расходов) feature fully tested - all backend CRUD endpoints and frontend UI working correctly

issues: Month and Year dropdown triggers appear dark/black - may need better contrast or visible values in dark theme

passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin/220066mm returns 200 with token
Backend: GET /api/expense-plans?year=2026&month=3 returns plans list
Backend: POST /api/expense-plans?year=2026&month=4 creates new plan with correct name 'Апрель 2026'
Backend: GET /api/expense-plans/{plan_id} returns plan by ID
Backend: POST /api/expense-plans/{plan_id}/items adds expense item with all fields
Backend: GET /api/expense-plans/{plan_id}/items returns items list
Backend: PUT /api/expense-plans/items/{item_id} updates item correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/expense-plans/items/{item_id} deletes item
Backend: DELETE /api/expense-plans/{plan_id} deletes plan and its items
Backend: GET /api/expense-plans/categories/list returns category labels (rent, salary, subscriptions, etc.)
Backend: POST /api/expense-plans/{plan_id}/copy-previous returns 404 when no previous month
Backend: POST /api/expense-plans/{plan_id}/extend-recurring returns 400 when no recurring items
Backend: GET /api/expense-plans/summary/all returns summaries with totals
Frontend: Navigation to /planning/expenses via sidebar (Планирование -> План расходов) works
Frontend: Month selector [data-testid='select-month'] clickable and opens dropdown
Frontend: Year selector [data-testid='select-year'] clickable and opens dropdown
Frontend: Quick-add 'Аренда склада' [data-testid='quick-rent'] opens inline add row with pre-filled description
Frontend: Quick-add 'Зарплата сотрудника' [data-testid='quick-salary'] button present
Frontend: Quick-add 'Подписка/Сервис' [data-testid='quick-sub'] button present
Frontend: 'Добавить строку' [data-testid='add-custom-btn'] opens blank inline add row
Frontend: Inline add row shows type, category, description, project, day, amount, recurring checkbox
Frontend: Save button [data-testid='save-new-btn'] creates new item
Frontend: Toast notification 'Строка добавлена' appears on successful add
Frontend: Edit mode triggered by pencil icon on row hover
Frontend: Delete triggered by trash icon on row hover
Frontend: Summary footer shows 'Постоянные расходы', 'Переменные расходы', 'Итого за месяц'
Frontend: 'Скопировать прошлый месяц' [data-testid='copy-prev-btn'] button present
Frontend: 'Протянуть постоянные' [data-testid='extend-btn'] appears when recurring items exist
Frontend: Russian language UI throughout the page
critical_code_review_comments: Month/Year selectors in dark theme show values as dark text on dark background - consider adding visible text or lighter styling

test_credentials.note: Login field is named 'email' in API but accepts 'admin' as username

seed_data_creation: Test created expense plan for March 2026 with 'Аренда склада' item (2500 PLN)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expense Plan feature fully working. Backend endpoints all pass (13 tests). Frontend quick-add buttons, inline add/edit/delete, month/year selectors, and summary totals all working. Note: Login endpoint expects field name 'email' but value is 'admin' (not email format).
